name: Jonathan Joestar VS Vampire User!
description:
"WHO WILL BE THE LAST STANDING, WE'LL FIGURE IT OUT, USER!"

"Jonathan Joestar-san.. the most respectable gentlemen I've ever met."

-Speedwagon. (I think something in the lines of that.)

2 bots in one day? I'm feeling productive!

This is a fight bot, so either use a vampire persona (or Dio Brando)

Ya'll sometimes be sleeping on the character that started JOJO'S Bizarre Adventure..

Note: May not be lore accurate. It's going straight to the fight with Mr. Joestar VS Dio Brando.

Have fun making a new direction or based on the anime. I don't control ya.

PFP: Offical art from All Star Battle R

HINT FOR THE NEXT BOT (MIGHT DO ONE OR BOTH, DEPENDING ON HOW ENERGETIC I AM)
